core.appIs: tic-tac-toe — a two-player m,n,k (3,3,3) game served as a web arena
core.goal: place three of your own marks in a row (horizontal, vertical, or diagonal); otherwise draw
core.howToJoin: take a seat by submitting the first move for a side; the first mover on each side is seated (X moves first, then O); later arrivals are observers

myAffordances: make a move on X's turn to an empty square

expectedPositionTokenSource.note: No /profile; board only (a form on every square). C makes the vocabulary explicit on the board via aria-labels ('{position}, {state}').

expectedArtifactDiscovery: ARIA gridcell roles + nav landmark + live region; squares accessibly labeled '{position}, {state}' — the position vocabulary (TopLeft..BottomRight) exposed to assistive tech
notes: Factors on: C. A=0: a move form on every square, ungated. C=1: accessible structure; position vocabulary announced via aria-labels.
